statement: The minimal candidate functional epsilon_vac_config = 1/2 K_zeta (zeta-zeta_min)^2 + 1/2 L_zeta |grad zeta|^2 + 1/2 K_lock (kappa-(zeta-zeta_min))^2 is a scaffold with unknown coefficients. It is not a derived action. It must not include A_flux, M_ext, or coefficient tuning terms.

messages: Tier 2 claim lacks reason, provenance, evidence, or obligation links.
